zh.lifeSummary: 當Kerdale De Moravia於1132年出生在蘇格蘭米德洛迪安時，她的父親Freskin de Moravia33歲，母親Joanna Lady of Strathnaver23歲。她於1150年之前與Sir Theobald le Fleming在蘇格蘭結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。她去世於1221年享年89歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Kerdale De Moravia于1132年出生在苏格兰米德洛迪安时，她的父亲Freskin de Moravia33岁，母亲Joanna Lady of Strathnaver23岁。她于1150年之前与Sir Theobald le Fleming在苏格兰结婚。他们至少是1个儿子的父母。她去世于1221年享年89岁。

nameMeanings.name: De
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

en.lifeSummary: When Kerdale De Moravia was born in 1132, in Midlothian, Scotland, her father, Freskin de Moravia, was 33 and her mother, Joanna Lady of Strathnaver, was 23. She married Sir Theobald le Fleming before 1150, in Scotland. They were the parents of at least 1 son. She died in 1221, at the age of 89.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Kerdale De Moravia est née en 1132, à Midlothian, Écosse, son père, Freskin de Moravia, avait 33 ans et sa mère, Joanna Lady of Strathnaver, avait 23 ans. Elle a épousé Sir Theobald le Fleming avant 1150, à Écosse. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. Elle est décédée en 1221, à l’âge de 89 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Kerdale De Moravia 1132 in Midlothian, Scotland geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Freskin de Moravia 33 und ihre Mutter Joanna Lady of Strathnaver 23. Sie hat vor 1150 in Scotland Sir Theobald le Fleming geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn. Sie starb 1221 im Alter von 89 Jahren.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Kerdale De Moravia è nata il nel 1132 nel Midlothian, Scotland, sua padre, Freskin de Moravia, aveva 33 anni e sua madre, Joanna Lady of Strathnaver, aveva 23 anni. Lei sposato Sir Theobald le Fleming prima del 1150, nel Scotland. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio. Morì nel 1221, all'età di 89 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Kerdale De Moraviaが1132年にスコットランドミドロスアンで生まれた時，父Freskin de Moraviaは33歳，母Joanna Lady of Strathnaverは23歳であった。1150年以前にスコットランドでSir Theobald le Flemingと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子の親であった。彼女は1221年に89歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Kerdale De Moravia(이)가 1132년 스컷랜드 미들로스이언에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Freskin de Moravia(은)는 33세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Joanna Lady of Strathnaver(은)는 23세였다. 그녀는 1150년 이전 스컷랜드에서 Sir Theobald le Fleming(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1221년 89세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Kerdale De Moravia nasceu em 1132, em Midlothian, Scotland, seu pai, Freskin de Moravia, tinha 33 anos e sua mãe, Joanna Lady of Strathnaver, tinha 23 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir Theobald le Fleming antes 1150, em Scotland. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho. Ela faleceu em 1221, com 89 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Kerdale De Moravia родилась в 1132 г. в местности мидлотян, Шотландия, её отцу по имени Freskin de Moravia было 33 года, а матери, которую звали Joanna Lady of Strathnaver, 23. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir Theobald le Fleming перед 1150 г. в местности Шотландия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. Она умерла в 1221 г. в возрасте 89 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Kerdale De Moravia nació en 1132, en Midlothian, Scotland, su papá, Freskin de Moravia, tenía 33 años y su mamá, Joanna Lady of Strathnaver, tenía 23 años. Se casó con Sir Theobald le Fleming antes de 1150, en Scotland. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo. Murió en 1221, a la edad de 89 años.
